历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Chongqing Physics Category were approximately 145, 145, 145, 161, and 159 respectively. Over the past 5 years, the rankings fluctuated narrowly between 145 and 161, showing overall extreme stability. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 159, slightly recovering from 161 in 2024. Tsinghua University's enrollment plan in Chongqing Physics Category: 19 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 24 in 2025, and 26 in 2026 (according to §7 document). Compared to 2025, 2026 sees a moderate expansion of 2 students (+8.3%), which has limited impact on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked first in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking for many years, making it a top-tier national institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Tsinghua University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general public opinion on campus management and dining, with no major negative incidents. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks second (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, indicating sustained high attention from applicants. Historical admission anomaly signals are low attention, with no obvious record of score gaps. Tsinghua University has over 20 A+ disciplines (including Computer Science and Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Clinical Medicine, Law, Marxist Theory, etc.) and more than 30 A-level and above disciplines, with top-tier national academic strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tsinghua's advantageous engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering maintain high social popularity, while medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain steadily popular. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination participants in Chongqing is about 209,000, slightly decreasing from the combined 212,851 in 2025 (Physics + History categories), easing competition pressure slightly. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a local Chongqing university, but as a top national institution, its cross-provincial appeal is extremely strong. Chongqing candidates show no significant regional preference when applying to Tsinghua.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high stability of historical rankings, the moderate expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2 students), a slight decrease in the total number of Chongqing candidates, and Tsinghua's solid top-tier status. The expansion slightly shifts the ranking backward, but the decrease in candidate numbers forms a hedge. Moreover, Tsinghua's ranking fluctuations in Chongqing Physics Category over the past 5 years are extremely small (standard deviation about 7), indicating a highly solidified application pattern. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 in Physics Category will be about 167, with a fluctuation range of 147–187.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Various Science Majors) (Including Cross Engineering and other majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (Tsinghua University only offers 2 admission majors in Chongqing Physics Category, with identical rankings).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Clinical Medicine Category (Including Clinical Medicine (Peking Union Medical College), Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Scientist)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Tsinghua University only offers two admission majors in Chongqing Physics Category: Science Experimental Class and Clinical Medicine Category. Over the past 5 years, the minimum admission rankings for both majors have been exactly the same (both at the school line ranking), with no obvious tier gradient. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 147–187 can actively apply, with similar admission probabilities for both majors. Those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 147) can be more secure. It is recommended that candidates choose between the Science Experimental Class (covering most of Tsinghua's engineering and science majors) and the Clinical Medicine Category based on personal interests and career plans.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tsinghua University in Chongqing's History Category were approximately 61st, 59th, 59th, 61st, and 66th respectively. Over the past 5 years, the rankings have fluctuated within a very narrow range of 59–66, showing extremely high stability. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 66th, a slight drop of 5 places compared to 2024 (61st). Tsinghua University's enrollment plan in Chongqing's History Category: 2 in 2021, 2 in 2022, 2 in 2023, 3 in 2024, 3 in 2025, and 3 in 2026. The 2026 plan remains unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 1st in the main ranking of China's universities by Soft Science for many years, making it a top-tier national institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Tsinghua University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving general public opinion on campus management and dining, with no major negative incidents. Its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 2nd (high heat), with massive exposure on short video platforms, indicating sustained high attention from applicants. Historical admission anomaly signals are low, with no obvious gaps. Tsinghua University's strength in liberal arts is also top-notch, with A+ in Law, A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Business Administration, A in Applied Economics, A in Journalism and Communication, etc. The Liberal Arts Experimental Class covers majors such as Sociology, with discipline strength leading nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a social popularity of slightly hot/recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, and Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing ordinary college entrance examination is approximately 209,000, a slight decrease from 2025. The estimated number of History Category candidates is about 72,100 (based on the recent proportion of History Category at about 34.5%), a slight decrease from 73,373 in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. The provincial control line has been stable in recent years. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, not a local university in Chongqing, but as a top national institution, its cross-provincial appeal is extremely strong. There is no significant regional preference influence for Chongqing History Category candidates applying to Tsinghua.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high stability of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of History Category candidates in Chongqing, and the solid top position of the school. With the plan unchanged and a slight decrease in candidates, the ranking should shift slightly backward (slightly intensified competition) or slightly forward compared to the 2025 baseline. However, since 2025 has already shifted backward by 5 places from 2024, a small regression needs to be considered. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be approximately 69th, with a fluctuation range of 61–77.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Tsinghua University only offers one admission major, the Liberal Arts Experimental Class, in Chongqing's History Category, with no tiered gradient. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 61–77 can actively apply. This major covers multiple directions such as Sociology, Law, Economics, and Journalism and Communication, allowing students to branch out based on interests after enrollment. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the upper-middle segment of the range (approximately 69th or above) apply boldly.
